summary: Fox News footage (anchor Harris Faulkner plus Capitol Hill testimony from Secret Service Director Sean Curran) overlaid with a White House text banner reading 'Democrats Have Shut Down the Department of Homeland Security for 72 Days.' A chyron during the testimony reads 'USSS DIR WARNS OF SIGNIFICANT UPTICK IN THREATS.' It is a TV news clip with an added text header.
notable_text: On-screen: 'Democrats Have Shut Down the Department of Homeland Security for 72 Days' / 'USSS DIR WARNS OF SIGNIFICANT UPTICK IN THREATS'.
